name: Salmon Buried in Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Heat a generous amount of butter in a large, oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Season with salt and white pepper.
3. Shred the Russet potatoes using a grater or food processor. Mix the shredded potatoes with lemon juice and sliced scallions.
4. Place half of the potato mixture on each piece of aluminum foil, forming a bed. Lay one salmon fillet on top of each potato bed.
5. Sprinkle the remaining potato mixture over the salmon. Cover tightly with more foil.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
7. In a saucepan, combine shallots, white wine, and vinegar. Cook over medium heat until most liquid evaporates.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining butter. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
9. When ready to serve, turn off the broiler. Uncover the salmon parcels and place them near the heat source for 2 minutes per side to brown.
10. Arrange browned salmon on a serving platter and pour the sauce over or alongside.
